title: CSS Typography Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties for styling text and enhancing the readability of your content.

questions.question: Which CSS property is specifically used to select the font you want to use for your text?
Which of these is the MOST recommended unit for setting font sizes on a professional website?
The 'line-height' property in CSS sets the vertical space between lines of text. True or False?
Which text-transform value is commonly used for 'Buy Now' or 'Submit' buttons to make the text appear in all uppercase letters?
Why is it important to always provide a 'generic' font name as a fallback in your font-family rule (e.g., sans-serif)?
options: To make the site load much faster.
In case the user's browser does not support the specific font you've requested.
To satisfy search engine crawler requirements.
